creator: ports@buetow.org
text:
A new release of net-im/micq has been made.

Fix: 

1. Removing all old patches from the ./files directory 

2. Here is a diff for the new Makefile:

9c9,10
< PORTVERSION=  0.5.2
---
> PORTVERSION=  0.5.1
> PORTREVISION= 1
	
3. Here is the new distinfo file with the new checksums:

MD5 (micq-0.5.2.tgz) = 93637064b64cd6323c24147dd950d12c
SHA256 (micq-0.5.2.tgz) = 4cf049f99b3f1e1ead0fe241d4b3f086a8d8574b0335b6983f7f4d7d52097f70
SIZE (micq-0.5.2.tgz) = 1118535
